adopted_roadmap.current_phase_progress: 2.5/3 DGs (DG-127 A + DG-128 A shipped + validated PASS, DG-129 A pending como último de FASE II)

activeDG.title: R19 module trust boundary tagging — último DG de FASE II 'cross-module intelligence'
activeDG.predecessor_baseline_12_status: H3-implicit-refinement PASS — rationale trajectory INC 0.45 (Baseline-8b) → hedged FP 0.90 (Baseline-11) → CATEGÓRICA FP 0.95 (Baseline-12). +50 confidence spread + verdict trajectory INC→FP→refined. R18 v2 completo (DG-127 A signature + DG-128 A body scan) transformó el pain point original del North Star principle empíricamente.
activeDG.r19_spec_from_research_doc_12_4: Module trust boundary tagging (P1 priority): parse package.json exports/main + route definitions (Express/Fastify/Hono/Koa) + tsconfig paths + test/src structure → tag cada file como 'public-entry' (API endpoints, HTTP handlers) / 'internal-handler' (business logic invoked from public-entry) / 'startup-config' (initialization, config loaders) / 'test-fixture' (test data, mocks) / 'private-worker' (background jobs, workers). Habilita al Triage Agent evaluar findings con contexto de exposición: SQL injection en public-entry = HIGH surface; misma pattern en private-worker = LOW surface. Empíricamente en Baseline-12 SYNAPTIC_SAAS agent.ts:62 es 'public-entry' (route.post) → si el finding fuera real TP, priority mucho más alto que si estuviera en private-worker.

candidate_sub_dgs.Sub_A1_Conservative: Filename + path heuristics solo — tag por convention (routes/, api/, handlers/ → public-entry; workers/, jobs/, tasks/ → private-worker; test/, __tests__/, fixtures/ → test-fixture). No parsing package.json ni tsconfig. Rápido de implementar pero superficial
candidate_sub_dgs.Sub_A2_Balanced_RECOMMENDED: Sub-A1 + parse package.json exports/main + basic route definition detection via regex heurístico (route.get, route.post, app.use, router.*, etc.) + tsconfig paths para monorepo public boundaries. Balance entre precision y scope
candidate_sub_dgs.Sub_A3_Innovative: Sub-A2 + full AST-level parsing de route definition frameworks (Fastify/Express/Hono/Koa/NestJS decorators) + parse compilerOptions.paths mapping + module.exports pattern detection para CJS + typescript-eslint-parser integration para type-aware analysis. Comprehensive pero multi-cycle
